title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 324.703 - License required for persons engaged in the business of housemoving
text:
324.703.  License required for persons engaged in the business of housemoving. — All persons who engage in the business of housemoving on the roads and highways of this state shall be licensed by the division of motor carrier and railroad safety.
(L. 2001 H.B. 567 merged with S.B. 317)
